name: run-shortcut
title: Run Shortcut
description: Search and run keyboard shortcuts by name or app
author: raycast

commands.name: search-shortcuts
commands.title: Search Shortcuts
commands.subtitle: Run Shortcut
commands.description: Search and run your registered keyboard shortcuts

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
